subject: General Awareness
question_text: Which order correctly represents the hierarchy of Padma Awards in India?

options.text: Padma Bhushan > Padma Vibhushan > Padma Shri
Padma Vibhushan > Padma Bhushan > Padma Shri
Padma Shri > Padma Bhushan > Padma Vibhushan
Padma Bhushan > Padma Shri > Padma Vibhushan

solution.final_answer: Padma Vibhushan > Padma Bhushan > Padma Shri

explanation.concept: Padma Awards are civilian honors ranked below Bharat Ratna, with three categories in descending order.
step_by_step: Compare each option with correct hierarchy

why_correct.B: Correct hierarchy from highest to lowest is Padma Vibhushan, Padma Bhushan, Padma Shri.
